message:
fix(web): suppress result_large_err clippy lint on request_region closures

The project's Error type is 128+ bytes by design. Adding targeted
#[allow(clippy::result_large_err)] on run_sync and its test module
removes 1 of 18 remaining clippy -D warnings errors without changing
the API surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
